zh.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II是Lord Richard Hughes I的兒子，於1505年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾。他和Lady Catherine Herbert至少有10個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1566年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II是Lord Richard Hughes I的儿子，于1505年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾。他和Lady Catherine Herbert至少有10个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1566年在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II was born in 1505, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Lord Richard Hughes I. He had at least 10 sons and 5 daughters with Lady Catherine Herbert. He died in 1566, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr., Mathavarn, Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II est né en 1505, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Lord Richard Hughes I. Il a eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles avec Lady Catherine Herbert. Il est décédé en 1566, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II wurde 1505 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Lord Richard Hughes I geboren. Er hatte mit Lady Catherine Herbert mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1566 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II è nato il nel 1505 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Lord Richard Hughes I. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie con Lady Catherine Herbert. Morì nel 1566, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes IIは1505年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでLord Richard Hughes Iの息子として生まれた。彼はLady Catherine Herbertとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1566年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II(은)는 1505년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Lord Richard Hughes I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Lady Catherine Herbert(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II nasceu em 1505, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Lord Richard Hughes I. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas com Lady Catherine Herbert. Ele faleceu em 1566, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II родился в 1505 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Lord Richard Hughes I. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Lady Catherine Herbert. Он умер в 1566 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Lord Richard Hughes II nació en 1505, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Lord Richard Hughes I. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas con Lady Catherine Herbert. Murió en 1566, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
